languages.text: "Жаль, что верные слуги Бога-Императора вынуждены сражаться друг против друга, словно гончие на потеху жестокого господина". {n}В голосе Себериана и впрямь звучит сожаление, когда его пальцы с металлическим лязгом сжимаются на рукояти оружия.{/n} "А ваш господин поистине жесток".

"It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."
languages.original_text: "Жаль, что верные слуги Бога-Императора вынуждены сражаться друг против друга, словно гончие на потеху жестокого господина". {n}В голосе Себериана и впрямь звучит сожаление, когда его пальцы с металлическим лязгом сжимаются на рукояти оружия.{/n} "А ваш господин поистине жесток".

traits.locale_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

"It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

"It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

languages.text: “神皇的忠仆被迫像猎犬一样自相残杀，只因恶主一时兴起，这世道可真是悲哀。”{n}塞贝里安的语气中流露出一丝真切的惋惜。与此同时，他的手握住剑柄，发出金属碰撞声。{/n}“而你的主子，是个十足的恶主。”
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

traits.locale_text: “神皇的忠仆被迫像猎犬一样自相残杀，只因恶主一时兴起，这世道可真是悲哀。”{n}塞贝里安的语气中流露出一丝真切的惋惜。与此同时，他的手握住剑柄，发出金属碰撞声。{/n}“而你的主子，是个十足的恶主。”

languages.text: « Où va le monde, quand de fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu se voient contraints de se battre comme des chiens pour satisfaire les caprices d'un maître cruel ? » {n}Le regret est palpable dans la voix de Seberian alors que ses doigts se referment sur la poignée de son arme avec un claquement métallique.{/n} « Et votre maître à vous est un monstre de cruauté. »
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

traits.locale_text: « Où va le monde, quand de fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu se voient contraints de se battre comme des chiens pour satisfaire les caprices d'un maître cruel ? » {n}Le regret est palpable dans la voix de Seberian alors que ses doigts se referment sur la poignée de son arme avec un claquement métallique.{/n} « Et votre maître à vous est un monstre de cruauté. »

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârlarının, zalim bir efendinin kaprisleri uğrunda tazılar gibi birbirleriyle dalaşmaya itilmesi ne kadar üzücü." {n}Parmakları metalik bir şangırtıyla silahının kabzasında kapanırken Seberian'ın sesindeki samimi pişmanlığı duyuyorsun.{/n} "Senin efendin de ziyadesiyle zalim."
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârlarının, zalim bir efendinin kaprisleri uğrunda tazılar gibi birbirleriyle dalaşmaya itilmesi ne kadar üzücü." {n}Parmakları metalik bir şangırtıyla silahının kabzasında kapanırken Seberian'ın sesindeki samimi pişmanlığı duyuyorsun.{/n} "Senin efendin de ziyadesiyle zalim."

languages.text: «Es una triste situación cuando los fieles sirvientes del Dios Emperador se ven obligados a luchar como perros por el capricho de un amo cruel». {n}Oyes un lamento sincero en la voz de Seberian cuando sujeta la empuñadura de su arma con clamor metálico.{/n} «Y su amo es verdaderamente cruel».
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

traits.locale_text: «Es una triste situación cuando los fieles sirvientes del Dios Emperador se ven obligados a luchar como perros por el capricho de un amo cruel». {n}Oyes un lamento sincero en la voz de Seberian cuando sujeta la empuñadura de su arma con clamor metálico.{/n} «Y su amo es verdaderamente cruel».

languages.text: "Es ist eine traurige Angelegenheit, wenn treue Diener des Gottimperators gezwungen sind, gegeneinander zu kämpfen wie die Hunde eines grausamen Meisters." {n}Du erkennst tatsächlich bedauern in Seberians Stimme, als sich seine Finger mit einem metallischen Klicken um den Griff seiner Waffe legen.{/n} "Und Euer Meister ist in der Tat grausam."
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine traurige Angelegenheit, wenn treue Diener des Gottimperators gezwungen sind, gegeneinander zu kämpfen wie die Hunde eines grausamen Meisters." {n}Du erkennst tatsächlich bedauern in Seberians Stimme, als sich seine Finger mit einem metallischen Klicken um den Griff seiner Waffe legen.{/n} "Und Euer Meister ist in der Tat grausam."

languages.text: 「神皇帝の忠実な臣下たちが、残酷な主人の思召しで犬のように互いに戦わされるのは、哀れな状況だ。」{n}シベリアンの声が、武器の柄を握りしめる金属音と共に、後悔に満ちている。{/n}「そして、あなたの主は本当に残酷だ。」
languages.original_text: "It is a sad state of affairs when loyal servants of the God-Emperor are forced to fight one another like hounds at the whim of a cruel master." {n}You do, in fact, hear regret in Seberian's voice as his fingers close around the hilt of his weapon with a metallic clank.{/n} "And your master is truly cruel."
